I'm mod for the game I'm so happy you guys like this game hopefully it gets popular!!!!

I love swing so much because there’s so much to do. PVP is one of my favorite but horror is also so much fun. the mechanics of this game really make it enjoyable and the community is great too! There’s so many cosmetics to buy in shop and I even met the owner! The owner is really kind and humble and just a fun person to be around. I’d recommend this game to anyone because it really is the best VR game out right now! Even after just being released for only 2 days!!!

Me and my friend played this and I was thinking I’d be a good mod

The game is very well built I really enjoy the community and how sweet and non-toxic. It is and like the developers did such a good job in this game and I would love to be become a moderator and help with anything that the main admin would need and I would be a very good asset to the swing VR team.

This game is amazing and I recommend playing it with your friends, this game came out 2 days ago I believe and for a game that just came out, it’s amazing! So far they have horror, a forest map, and a pvp, there is couple of bugs in the game but it doesn’t matter, the fun of the game is amazing, I met the owner and he is really nice, Horror is definitely scary! PvP is cool! And Forest map is like any other forest map in a gtag fan game 👍 Overall 11/10 Game!
